items.title: Matplotlib scatter API — c, cmap, alpha, legend
items.author: Matplotlib developers
items.note: Reference for color encoding, transparency, and legend construction on embedding scatter plots.

items.title: ColorBrewer — color advice for cartography (colorblind-safe palettes)
items.author: Cynthia A. Brewer, Penn State
items.note: Guidance on qualitative, sequential, and diverging palettes suitable for categorical label coloring.

items.title: Fundamentals of Data Visualization (Wilke)
items.author: Claus O. Wilke
items.note: Accessible principles for honest axes, encoding choices, and publication-quality figure design.

items.title: The Visual Display of Quantitative Information (Tufte)
items.author: Edward R. Tufte
items.note: Classic treatment of chart integrity, data–ink ratio, and avoiding misleading graphical elements.
